patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (DOB 05/05/1952) followed at Singing River Gulfport. Active problem list includes Mixed dyslipidemia (Primary), Essential hypertension, leg pain, postoperative anemia, and unspecified anemia. Notable laboratory abnormalities from 07/03/2023: Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL; Iron 41 (L) ug/dL with Iron Saturation 15% (L); Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL; VLDL 32 (H) mg/dL; eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2; Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L; Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L. Primary care provider is Hoyet A. Hand, MD. Functional assessment documents difficulty walking or climbing stairs. Follow-up and multiple upcoming specialty and primary care visits are scheduled in 2024.
